name: Shimazu Shave Ice
tagline: Old-school Kalihi corner shop — shave ice the way your tutu remembers it.
mustOrder: rainbow with ice cream on the bottom
parking: Street parking on Kalihi St — not hard to find a spot
talkStory: The Shimazu family has run this Kalihi corner shop for decades, serving a neighborhood that most tourists will never visit. The shave ice is old-school local style -- fine-shaved ice with classic syrups in flavors like li hing mui, coconut, and rainbow. The aunties behind the counter know every kid in the neighborhood by name and often slip regulars an extra-generous pour. Cash preferred, no frills -- just a counter window and a bench. This is what shave ice looked like before it got gentrified.
